nasb.text: And I answered the second time and said to him, “What are the two olive branches which are beside the two golden pipes, which empty the golden oil from themselves?”

esv.text: And a second time I answered and said to him, “What are these two branches of the olive trees, which are beside the two golden pipes from which the golden oil is poured out?”

cnv.text: 我又問他：“在兩根流出金色油的金管子旁邊的兩根橄欖樹枝，究竟是甚麼意思？”

ccb.text: 然后我又问道：“流出橄榄油的两个金管旁边的两根橄榄枝是什么意思？”
